name: pay_activity
description: 312付费构成与活动分析：付费概览、普通充值vs直购、充值档位、美元分层、分层×活动参与、活动总览、分层×道具产销
summary_template: 【付费构成与活动分析】游戏 {game_id}，分析窗口 {analysis_start}~{analysis_end}

overview.name: 付费概览
overview.sql:
WITH pay AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS payer_count,
         COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
         SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS revenue
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
),
dau AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS dau
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_rolelogin
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  d.dau,
  p.payer_count,
  ROUND(p.revenue, 2) AS revenue_usd,
  p.pay_times,
  ROUND(CAST(p.payer_count AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(d.dau, 0) * 100, 2) AS pay_rate_pct,
  ROUND(p.revenue / NULLIF(p.payer_count, 0), 2) AS arppu,
  ROUND(CAST(p.pay_times AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(p.payer_count, 0), 2) AS avg_pay_times
FROM pay p CROSS JOIN dau d

pay_composition.name: 付费构成
pay_composition.sql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN strpos(pay_itemid, ':') > 0 THEN '直购' ELSE '普通充值' END AS pay_kind,
  CASE WHEN strpos(pay_itemid, ':') > 0 THEN split_part(pay_itemid, ':', 1) ELSE '' END AS act_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS payer_count,
  COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
  ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)), 2) AS pay_amount,
  ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)) * 100.0
        / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0))) OVER (), 0), 2) AS amount_pct
FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
WHERE game_id = {game_id}
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY pay_amount DESC

pay_tiers.name: 充值档位分布
pay_tiers.sql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT role_id, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0) AS amt
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amt < 1 THEN '<$1'
    WHEN amt < 5 THEN '$1~5'
    WHEN amt < 10 THEN '$5~10'
    WHEN amt < 20 THEN '$10~20'
    WHEN amt < 50 THEN '$20~50'
    WHEN amt < 100 THEN '$50~100'
    ELSE '>=$100'
  END AS price_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS pay_times,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS payer_count,
  ROUND(SUM(amt), 2) AS pay_amount
FROM t
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(amt)

payer_segments.name: 付费用户分层
payer_segments.sql:
WITH per_role AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS total
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
seg AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN total < 10 THEN 1 WHEN total < 20 THEN 2 WHEN total < 40 THEN 3
      WHEN total < 80 THEN 4 WHEN total < 100 THEN 5 WHEN total < 150 THEN 6
      WHEN total < 200 THEN 7 WHEN total < 300 THEN 8 ELSE 9
    END AS seg_no,
    total
  FROM per_role
)
SELECT
  seg_no,
  CASE seg_no
    WHEN 1 THEN '<$10' WHEN 2 THEN '$10~20' WHEN 3 THEN '$20~40'
    WHEN 4 THEN '$40~80' WHEN 5 THEN '$80~100' WHEN 6 THEN '$100~150'
    WHEN 7 THEN '$150~200' WHEN 8 THEN '$200~300' ELSE '>=$300'
  END AS segment,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count,
  ROUND(SUM(total), 2) AS pay_amount,
  ROUND(SUM(total) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(total)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS amount_pct,
  ROUND(SUM(total) / COUNT(*), 2) AS arppu
FROM seg
GROUP BY seg_no
ORDER BY seg_no

segment_activity.name: 分层×活动参与
segment_activity.sql:
WITH per_role AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS total
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
seg AS (
  SELECT role_id,
    CASE
      WHEN total < 10 THEN 1 WHEN total < 20 THEN 2 WHEN total < 40 THEN 3
      WHEN total < 80 THEN 4 WHEN total < 100 THEN 5 WHEN total < 150 THEN 6
      WHEN total < 200 THEN 7 WHEN total < 300 THEN 8 ELSE 9
    END AS seg_no
  FROM per_role
),
promo AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(json_extract_scalar(activity_topic, '$.cn'), activity_topic) AS topic_cn,
         role_id
  FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_log_rolepromo
  WHERE game_id = '{game_id_str}'
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    AND role_type = 1
    {server_filter}
)
SELECT
  s.seg_no,
  CASE s.seg_no
    WHEN 1 THEN '<$10' WHEN 2 THEN '$10~20' WHEN 3 THEN '$20~40'
    WHEN 4 THEN '$40~80' WHEN 5 THEN '$80~100' WHEN 6 THEN '$100~150'
    WHEN 7 THEN '$150~200' WHEN 8 THEN '$200~300' ELSE '>=$300'
  END AS segment,
  p.topic_cn AS activity_topic,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.role_id) AS user_count,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM promo p
JOIN seg s ON p.role_id = s.role_id
GROUP BY s.seg_no, p.topic_cn
ORDER BY s.seg_no, user_count DESC

activity_overview.name: 活动总览
activity_overview.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract_scalar(activity_topic, '$.cn'), activity_topic) AS activity_topic,
  COUNT(DISTINCT role_id) AS user_count,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_log_rolepromo
WHERE game_id = '{game_id_str}'
  AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  AND role_type = 1
  {server_filter}
GROUP BY COALESCE(json_extract_scalar(activity_topic, '$.cn'), activity_topic)
ORDER BY user_count DESC
LIMIT 100

segment_item_flow.name: 分层×道具产销
segment_item_flow.sql:
WITH per_role AS (
  SELECT role_id, SUM(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pay_money AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS total
  FROM gamelog_raw.v_presto_log_payrecharge
  WHERE game_id = {game_id}
    AND ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
    {server_filter}
  GROUP BY role_id
),
seg AS (
  SELECT role_id,
    CASE
      WHEN total < 10 THEN 1 WHEN total < 20 THEN 2 WHEN total < 40 THEN 3
      WHEN total < 80 THEN 4 WHEN total < 100 THEN 5 WHEN total < 150 THEN 6
      WHEN total < 200 THEN 7 WHEN total < 300 THEN 8 ELSE 9
    END AS seg_no
  FROM per_role
)
SELECT
  s.seg_no,
  CASE s.seg_no
    WHEN 1 THEN '<$10' WHEN 2 THEN '$10~20' WHEN 3 THEN '$20~40'
    WHEN 4 THEN '$40~80' WHEN 5 THEN '$80~100' WHEN 6 THEN '$100~150'
    WHEN 7 THEN '$150~200' WHEN 8 THEN '$200~300' ELSE '>=$300'
  END AS segment,
  CASE r.change_type WHEN '1' THEN '产出' WHEN '2' THEN '消耗' ELSE r.change_type END AS direction,
  r.item_id,
  r.item_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.role_id) AS user_count,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  SUM(ABS(CAST(r.status_after AS BIGINT) - CAST(r.status_before AS BIGINT))) AS amount
FROM gameeco_raw.v_presto_log_roleitem r
JOIN seg s ON r.role_id = s.role_id
WHERE r.game_id = '{game_id_str}'
  AND r.ds BETWEEN '{analysis_start}' AND '{analysis_end}'
  AND r.role_type = 1
  AND SUBSTR(CAST(r.server_id AS VARCHAR), 5, 1) != '4'
GROUP BY s.seg_no, r.change_type, r.item_id, r.item_name
ORDER BY s.seg_no, direction, amount DESC
